states.description: Engine initializes core manifests, schemas, and system registry.
Selected game content pack is loaded and validated.
Player progression, inventory, and profile data are loaded.
Persistent tower memory and floor history are loaded.
Runtime determines which floor the player or party will enter.
Runtime either generates a new floor or restores a previously visited floor.
Floor is altered according to accumulated residue and mutation rules.
Player entities are placed into the active floor.
Enemies, hazards, events, and hidden marks are instantiated.
Main playable loop for movement, combat, loot, interaction, and exploration.
Runtime determines victory, retreat, defeat, disconnect, or unresolved exit.
Runtime records actions, deaths, damage patterns, exploration, and floor outcome.
Persistent tower state is updated using residue and outcome rules.
Player profile, tower memory, and relevant session data are persisted.
Runtime routes the player to hub, next floor, previous floor, retry, or exit.
